since_last: 43% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.60%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.17% · BTC -1.19% · Gold +0.82% · Nasdaq100 -1.29%. 43% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.60%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.60%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at -8.31%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +4.32%, NET +3.76%, UPST +3.35%, SAP +2.64%, CRM +2.64%. Laggards: AMAT -8.31%, LRCX -7.59%, TER -6.85%, KLAC -6.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.96% at $155.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
